meaning: n.毛泽东主义者 adj.毛泽东的,毛(泽东)主义的
examples: Forest dwellers lament being caught between Maoist bandits, exploitative miners and thuggish security men.
A train carrying some 1, 200 passengers was held for six hours in the Indian state of West Bengal by a militia supported by Maoist Naxalite rebels.
Binayak sen, an Indian activist who was sentenced to life imprisonment on charges of aiding Maoist fighters, was freed on bail by India's Supreme Court.
Prime Minister Manmohan Singh has described the Maoist insurgency as India's biggest internal security challenge.
India's top anti-terrorism investigators are visiting the site of Saturday's deadly attack by Maoist rebels in the state of Chhattisgarh.
